name: KIRBY CORP
business: Kirby Corp is the nation's largest domestic tank barge operator transporting bulk liquid products such as petrochemicals, black oil, refined petroleum products, and agricultural chemicals on inland waterways and coastal routes. Through its Distribution and Services segment, the company provides equipment, after-market parts, and services for power generation systems, marine and industrial applications, and manufactures specialized equipment including pressure pumping units and electric fracturing systems.
sellsTo: Commercial and industrial customers (marine repair, on-highway, railroad)

exposures.sentence: The Company is the nation's largest domestic tank barge operator transporting bulk liquid products throughout the Mississippi River System, on the Gulf Intracoastal Waterway, and coastwise along all three United States coasts.
The petrochemical market, the Company's largest market, contributed 48% of marine transportation revenues for 2025.
The Company transports petrochemicals, black oil, refined petroleum products and agricultural chemicals by tank barge.

The Company also manufactures and remanufactures specialized equipment, including pressure pumping units and electric fracturing systems, electric power generation equipment, and specialized electrical distribution and control equipment for data centers, oilfield service, railroad and other industrial customers.
Recent growth in prime power (behind the meter) and data center demand has contributed to increased revenue in the power generation market in the KDS segment.

Through KDS, the Company provides equipment, after-market parts and services for power generation systems in applications that include behind the meter power systems and emergency backup systems, after-market and genuine replacement parts and services for engines, transmissions, reduction gears, electric motors, drives, and controls, specialized electrical distribution and controls systems, and related equipment used in power generation, marine, on-highway, oilfield services, and other industrial applications.
The Company also rents equipment including generators, industrial compressors, high-capacity lift trucks, construction equipment and refrigeration trailers for use in a variety of industrial markets.

The Company also manufactures and remanufactures specialized equipment, including pressure pumping units and electric fracturing systems, electric power generation equipment, and specialized electrical distribution and control equipment for data centers, oilfield service, railroad and other industrial customers.
In the commercial and industrial market, revenues increased 5% in 2025 compared to 2024 primarily due to higher business levels in marine repair.

catalysts.event: Delivery of 60 to 70 new inland tank barges
catalysts.sentence: The Company estimates that approximately 60 to 70 new tank barges have currently been ordered for delivery in 2026 and expects a number of older tank barges will be retired, dependent on 2026 market conditions.
